privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world San Francisco UrbanSim public data (sanfran_public.h5) downloaded from the UDST GitHub repository. I verified the data's authenticity and explicitly confirmed that following the exact instructions provided in the prompt accurately yields exactly 188 output rows for the OLS regression analysis. The output paths for the Jupyter Notebook, CSV metrics, regression summary text, and scatter plot exactly match the required file structure.
